slides.body: The algorithm decides what you earn and changes the rules whenever it wants. People making real money online don't depend on platforms paying them — they get paid by clients directly.
Creators and streamers need their long content cut into short clips daily. They pay *$1–$3* per *1k* views. No followers needed. Just a phone and consistency.
Creators get *50* DMs a day from people who want to clip for them. The ones who get hired show their stats in one link. No screenshots. No back-and-forth.

One link. All your stats.
Send it to any creator.
